title: Historical Battle Site Preservation Act

The '''Historical Battle Site Preservation Act''' (HBSPA) was an act passed by [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] created to protect and preserve artifacts from battle zones of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Background==
As early as the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], artifacts from the land, sea, air and space battles between [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] forces began to find their way into the hands of both private collectors and criminals. When hostilities between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Imperial Remnant]] began to subside, private scavenging operations at battle sites increased in earnest, hoping to collect valuable scrap, artifacts and useful equipment. After an Imperial [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] fulminated in the home of a [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] battle artifact collector and a [[Rudrig/Legends|Rudrigian]] gang was found in possession of operational [[Interrogation droid/Legends|interrogation droids]], the HBSPA gained the support it needed for passage through the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]].

==Contents==
The Act took major steps, to defined battle sites protected by the Act. And to make the removal of artifacts from defined sites by unauthorized parties illegal. The Act also established [[Operation Flotsam]] and funded its fleet of [[Cargo hauler/Legends|cargo haulers]], as well as fund the [[Alliance War Museum]] to safely and properly house the recovered artifacts for the public good.
